domain: Aikido kata (Japanese martial-arts paired-form curriculum; uke-tori paired drill with 24 progressive-difficulty attacks; Ikkyo-Rokkyo elbow-techniques ordered by technical complexity; kyu/dan mastery checkpoints gating advancement; ukemi mastery itself trained separately)
specific_mechanism: KATA-CHECKPOINT: paired-form curriculum LLM pretraining with mastery-gate advancement. (1) Curriculum lattice of M kata-stages S_1...S_M ordered by difficulty score (perplexity surrogate, syntactic depth, multi-hop reasoning depth). (2) Per-stage checkpoint evaluation E_i; advance to S_{i+1} only when E_i ≥ θ_i. (3) Paired drill: each example pairs (uke prompt — attacker initiating, tori response — receiver completing); model trained on both sides via mirrored loss. (4) Mastery gate failure E_i < θ_i triggers stage replay with adaptive sample-difficulty-tail resampling. (5) Skill-tree dependency: some kata-stages have multiple prerequisite paths.
llm_application: KATA-CHECKPOINT for LLM pretraining: progressive-difficulty kata-stage curriculum + per-stage mastery-checkpoint gate + paired uke-tori bilateral training + failure-driven adaptive resample. Differs from Curriculum Learning LLM Pretraining 2601.21698 (systematic CL analysis but no mastery-gate checkpoint or paired bilateral training), Beyond Random Sampling 2506.11300 (curriculum data ordering — accelerates 18-45% but no checkpoint mastery gate), Curriculum-Guided Layer Scaling 2506.11389 (stratified curriculum + layer-scale but no kata-paired bilateral), LR Decay Curriculum 2511.18903 (schedule interaction — not paired kata-mastery). Differs from R407, R410 training-method sisters, R432 SONGLINE-CURRICULUM (spatial-waypoint not paired-kata), R446 OTEA-APARIMA (paired SFT+RL precision/speed, not kata-mastery-gate) by EXPLICIT MASTERY-GATE CHECKPOINTS + PAIRED UKE-TORI BILATERAL TRAINING.
novelty_claim: Curriculum Learning + Beyond Random Sampling + Curriculum-Guided Layer Scaling + LR Decay CL cover sequential staged LLM pretraining paradigm. KATA-CHECKPOINT adds (a) per-stage mastery-checkpoint gate before advancement + (b) paired uke-tori bilateral training (both initiator + responder) + (c) failure-driven adaptive sample resampling. Recombination — gating + bilateral training individually exist.
